app.title: Hello everyone 😊
agents.title: Agents
agents.empty: No agents yet. Start one to run Claude on another project in parallel.
repo.label: Project
mode.label: View mode
apptab.prepareHint: Write preview instructions into this project's CLAUDE.md
apptab.prepared: Wrote preview steps to CLAUDE.md -- review it in the Files tab, then ask Claude to start the app.
apptab.emptyBody: Ask Claude in the Chat tab to start your app on port {port}, bound to 0.0.0.0 and launched detached so it keeps running.
pwgate.title: Welcome back
pwgate.subtitle: Enter your access code to open your workspace.
chat.greeting: Hi! How can I help you today?
chat.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.sendError: Something went wrong while sending your message. Please try again.
chat.uploadError: Couldn't upload the file. Please try again.
chat.resumed: We're picking up where you left off. What would you like to do next?
chat.resumeError: Couldn't load that conversation. You can still continue it by sending a message.
picker.empty: No conversations yet. Start a new one!
files.emptyHint: Ask Claude in the chat to create something.
files.loadError: We couldn't open this folder. Please try again.
files.longPressHint: Tip: press and hold a file to add it to your message
history.restoredToast: Done -- went back to that version
history.restoreErrorToast: Couldn't go back -- please try again
history.loadError: We couldn't load your saved versions. Please try again.
history.emptyHint: Tap Save at the top to keep a snapshot of your work.
history.confirmBody: This will undo all changes made after:
